name: Wheat Berry Salad with Walnuts & Cashews
recipeIngredient: 2 Apples, Gravenstein or Granny Smith, halved and cored
recipeInstructions:
1. Place wheat berries and water in a large saucepan.
Bring to a boil over high heat, stirring frequently.
Reduce heat to medium and simmer until very tender,
about 1 hour and 10 minutes. Drain and transfer to a
large bowl.
2. Add oil, orange juice, vinegar, coriander, caraway
seeds, apples, mint, salt and pepper. Toss well.
3. Just before serving, add cashews; mix well.
NOTE: You may substitute cooked brown rice or coarse cracked wheat for the wheat berries.
But wheat berries add a pleasingly chewy texture.
